productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Solid Beige Handbag
description: A gorgeous design has been lazer cut into the front of this beige bag from lino perros. There are so many special details about this bag &ndash from the luxurious feel of the synthetic leather, the quirky tassels and the warm yellow colour peeking through the lazer cuts. This bag is sure to become a firm favourite in your wardrobe. Height: 28 cmWidth: 36 cmDepth: 11 cm Made of beige synthetic leather with a lazer cut design and yellow patent inner layer Has one zippered compartment with two inner zipper pockets and organiser sleeves for a mobile and essentials Two short handles with fake snake skin design and tassels for carrying ease and style One zippered compartment at the back for additional space Metallic embelishment with brand name on the side Care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
